mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bk_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT * FROM bk_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT * FROM bk_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT * FROM bk_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY record_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bk_record (user_id, type, amount, category_id, category_name, note, record_date, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{note}, #{recordDate}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
